sources.page_title: Fra-Ber Tex Car Seat and Fabric Cleaner and Stain Remover
sources.cleaned_content:
Product Images:
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/smacchiatore-sedili-e-pulitore-tessuti-auto-tex-fra-ber.jpg?v=1709281243
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/tex-modo-d-uso-1.jpg?v=1709281243
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/tex-modo-d-uso-2.jpg?v=1709281243
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/tex-modo-d-uso-3.jpg?v=1709281243
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/tex-modo-d-uso-4.jpg?v=1709281243
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/tex-modo-d-uso-5.jpg?v=1709281243
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/tex-modo-d-uso-6.jpg?v=1709281243
- https://shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/tex-600-ml-indicazioni-sicurezza-1.jpg?v=1709281243

Fra-Ber Tex Car Seat and Fabric Cleaner and Stain Remover

Price: €11,93
Format: 600 ml

Delivery usually in 3-5 days

THE BENEFITS OF TEX

Tex by Fra-Ber is an active foam stain remover and cleaner for car seats and fabrics that deeply cleans without leaving residue.

Main features:
- Active foam: the product creates a foam that cleans surfaces without wetting them.
- Cleans and hygienises**, removing unpleasant odours*: it leaves surfaces and fabrics clean and scented for longer;
- Suitable for cleaning fabric interiors: the product is suitable for cleaning all types of materials and fabrics, including upholstery, carpet and seats;
- Fragrance: it leaves a pleasant clean scent after each application.

* The mechanical action of the cloth exerted by the operator also helps to remove the substances responsible for unpleasant odours, along with the dirt.
** The term "hygienises", if present, refers to a physical or mechanical action. For example, the mechanical action of the cloth exerted by the operator.

TEX IS IDEAL
- For cleaning car seats, floor mats and all fabric surfaces and upholstery;
- For dry stain removal without the need for water to clean interior car fabrics and upholstery;
- As a ready-to-use product that’s easy to apply and quickly removes localised stains.

HOW TO USE TEX

We recommend using Tex as a stain remover for interior car fabrics and upholstery.

Main steps:
- Carefully vacuum the fabrics to be treated;
- Shake before use;
- Spray the product from a distance of about 20 cm, holding the can in a vertical position;
- Wipe with a clean cloth and wait for it to dry.

Use: use the product pure.

SAFETY INFO & DATA SHEET

PRODUCT CODE: 70901 - TEX 600ML SPRAY GAS

Safety symbols: https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0566/8850/9136/files/Simboli_pericolo_2.png?v=1698148518 , https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0566/8850/9136/files/Simboli_pericolo_5.png?v=1698148518

DANGER
H222 Extremely flammable aerosol.
H229 Pressurised container: May burst if heated.
H318 Causes serious eye damage.
P101 If medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand.
P102 Keep out of reach of children.
P210 Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames and other ignition sources. No smoking.
P211 Do not spray on an open flame or other ignition source.
P251 Do not pierce or burn, even after use.
P280 Wear protection/face protection.
P305+P351+P338 IN CASE OF CONTACT WITH THE EYES: rinse carefully with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses if present and easy to do. Keep on rinsing.
P410+P412 Protect from sunlight. Do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50°C/122°F.

Contains: SODIUM LAUROYL SARCOSINATE.
Contains among other ingredients: equal to or greater than 5% but below 15%: anionic surfactants, aliphatic hydrocarbons. Less than 5%: non-ionic surfactants. Perfume.

Data sheet: https://fraberantegnate-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/onedrive_fra-ber_it/EU_IdPbzijdGnePBG9h9b94B07BTrXldiqGP_juQle333w?e=OVfREW

Fra-Ber Tex Interior Cleaning Foam Upholstery & Leather Cleaner 600ml

Price: 357.00 EGP

Brand: Fra-Ber
SKU: 1126317
Type: Fra-Ber Tex Interior Cleaning Foam Upholstery & Leather Cleaner 600ml
Origin: Italy
Category: Car care chemicals
Code: 1126317

Italian car interior upholstery cleaner characterized by effective foam that cleans and brightens fabrics, carpets, Alcantara and fabrics.
Thanks to its special high-foaming formula, it effectively cleans carpets, wallpaper and fabric surfaces without leaving any residue.
It dries in a short time on the treated parts, leaving a pleasant scent.
Shake well before use. Spray the product from a distance of about 20 cm.
Then wipe the treated area with a clean cloth and wait for it to dry.
Dilution rate: The package is in the form of a spray, do not dilute.
Product code: 1302426

sources.page_title: FRA-BER TEX 600ML Active Foam Cleans & Brightens Fabrics
sources.cleaned_content:
Product Images:
- https://www.gecuae.com/web/image/product.product/5302/image_1024/%5BCCCCXX00062%5D%20FRA-BER%20TEX%20600ML%20Active%20Foam%20Cleans%20%26%20Brightens%20Fabrics?unique=26ffe04
- https://www.gecuae.com/web/image/product.image/7602/image_1024/FRA-BER%20TEX%20600ML%20Active%20Foam%20Cleans%20and%20Brightens%20Fabrics?unique=4613483

FRA-BER TEX 600ML Active Foam Cleans & Brightens Fabrics

Price: 0.00 AED
Availability: Not Available For Sale

Categories: Interior Chemicals, Multi-Purpose Cleaners, Exterior Chemicals, Active Foam

Description:
The FRA-BER TEX 600ML Active Foam is a professional interior cleaner designed to deep clean, brighten, and refresh fabric and carpet surfaces inside vehicles.

Its high-foam formula effectively removes dirt, stains, and bad odors while leaving a pleasant, long-lasting fragrance. The fast-drying, residue-free finish makes it ideal for car seats, roof lining, and interior fabrics, ensuring a clean and renewed appearance.

Directions for Use:
- Shake well before use.
- Spray evenly from a distance of about 20 cm, keeping the bottle upright.
- Wipe with a clean microfiber cloth and allow the surface to dry.
- The wiping action helps lift away dirt and odor-causing residues.

Highlights:
- Active foam for deep and gentle cleaning.
- Brightens fabric and carpet surfaces.
- Ideal for roof lining — does not damage adhesive or fabric.
- Safe, fast-drying, and easy to use.
